name: ai-tutor-reasoning
description: Worker B (Flue): the pure model executor for the ai-tutor reasoning stages. Built with `npx flue build --target cloudflare` and deployed from dist/ai_tutor_reasoning/wrangler.json. See docs/adr/0001-flue-reasoning-worker.md.

scripts.deploy: flue build --target cloudflare && wrangler deploy --config dist/ai_tutor_reasoning/wrangler.json
scripts.deploy:dry-run: flue build --target cloudflare && wrangler deploy --config dist/ai_tutor_reasoning/wrangler.json --dry-run
